items.name: obsidian-paper-curator
items.description: obsidian-paper-curator is an LLM-powered paper reading and knowledge base management tool built on LLM + Obsidian. Simply clip papers with the Obsidian Web Clipper, and three Agent Skills will automatically read, summarize, extract concepts, build cross-references, and maintain the structure — turning scattered papers into a compounding wiki.

items.name: langgraph-multi-agent-analytics
items.description: 传统数据分析 Agent 停留在“问答 + 工具调用”层面，存在口径不稳定、权限不可控、长任务上下文膨胀导致稳定性下降、人工介入后难以恢复工作流、结果缺少验证与审计等问题。针对这些痛点将原有多 Agent 原型升级为企业级分析工作流平台，围绕“语义治理、权限控制、执行风控、结果验证、断点恢复、可观测性”构建完整闭环，支持从用户提问到 SQL 执行、验证、报告交付的生产级分析流程。
